message: feat: adjust AI orb camera position
post:
The AI Orb in ApplyOS felt a bit too close, almost intrusive. It was impacting the user's perception of the interview space.

I needed to adjust the camera's perspective to create a more balanced and natural view. The goal was to make the AI feel present, but not overwhelming.

After some iteration, I found that a slight adjustment to the Z-axis of the camera position resolved the issue. It's a small change, but it significantly improved the overall feel of the experience.

How do you approach subtle UI adjustments that have a large perceptual impact?
alt: A code snippet showing the adjustment of the camera's Z-axis position in a React component.
